error[E0521]: borrowed data escapes outside of function
   --> src\main.rs:199:25
    |
185 |   pub fn named_pipe_frame_lengths(pipe_name: &str, frames: &[Vec<u8>]) -> io::Result<Vec<u32>> {
    |                                   ---------  - let's call the lifetime of this reference `'1`
    |                                   |
    |                                   `pipe_name` is a reference that is only valid in the function body
...
199 |       let client_handle = thread::spawn(move || {
    |  _________________________^
200 | |         client(pipe_name, frames)
201 | |     });
    | |      ^
    | |      |
    | |______`pipe_name` escapes the function body here
    |        argument requires that `'1` must outlive `'static`
